response: The email proposes a new $29/month “Starter” pricing tier placed between the existing Free and $79 Pro tiers, noting that 40% of churned users cited price as their reason for leaving and detailing the tier’s perks of 5 user accounts, 10K API calls, and email support. This proposed Starter tier is projected to recover 15% of these price-related churned users and generate $180K in additional annual recurring revenue.
